name: reset_param
full_help:
reset_param

Description: 
Reset a parameter

Syntax: 
reset_param  [-quiet] [-verbose] <name>

Returns: 
original value

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Parameter name

Categories: 
PropertyAndParameter

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
